attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SOCO.SO_CHANGE_ORD_KEY,
SOCO.SK_XXCCP_HDR_ID_INDCTR_INT,
COALESCE( SOCO.STATUS_CD, 'UNKNOWN') AS STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(SOCO.SUB_STATUS_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS SUB_STATUS_CD, 
COALESCE(SOCO.CHANGE_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS CHANGE_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SOCO.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-999),
SOCO.CHANGE_ORDER_CREATION_DTM,
SOCO.DV_CHANGE_ORDER_CREATION_DT,
SOCO.CHANGE_ORDER_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
SOCO.DV_CHANGE_ORDER_LAST_UPDATE_DT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
SOCO.ACTION_CODE,
(CASE WHEN NSOCO.SO_CHANGE_ORDER_KEY IS NOT NULL  THEN 'U' 
ELSE 'I'
END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
(
SELECT 
SMSC.SO_CHANGE_ORD_KEY AS SO_CHANGE_ORD_KEY,
SCOHA.STATUS AS STATUS_CD,
SCOHA.SUB_STATUS AS SUB_STATUS_CD,
SCOHA.OPERATION AS CHANGE_TYPE_CD,
NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SCOHA.XXCCP_HEADER_ID  AS SK_XXCCP_HDR_ID_INDCTR_INT,
SCOHA.CREATION_DATE AS CHANGE_ORDER_CREATION_DTM,
CAST(SCOHA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE ) AS  DV_CHANGE_ORDER_CREATION_DT,
SCOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS CHANGE_ORDER_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
CAST(SCOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE ) AS DV_CHANGE_ORDER_LAST_UPDATE_DT,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXCCP_OE_ORD_HDRS_ALL  SCOHA
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_CHANGE_ORDER   SMSC
ON SCOHA.XXCCP_HEADER_ID=SMSC.SK_XXCCP_HDR_ID_INDCTR_INT
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_N_SALES_ORDER_DAC  NSO
ON SCOHA.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
UNION ALL
SELECT 
SMSC.SO_CHANGE_ORD_KEY AS SO_CHANGE_ORD_KEY,
ECOHA.STATUS AS STATUS_CD,
ECOHA.SUB_STATUS AS SUB_STATUS_CD,
ECOHA.OPERATION AS CHANGE_TYPE_CD,
NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
ECOHA.XXCCP_HEADER_ID  AS SK_XXCCP_HDR_ID_INDCTR_INT,
ECOHA.CREATION_DATE AS CHANGE_ORDER_CREATION_DTM,
CAST(ECOHA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE ) AS  DV_CHANGE_ORDER_CREATION_DT,
ECOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS CHANGE_ORDER_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
CAST(ECOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE ) AS DV_CHANGE_ORDER_LAST_UPDATE_DT,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XXCCP_OE_ORD_HDRS_ALL  ECOHA
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_CHANGE_ORDER   SMSC
ON ECOHA.XXCCP_HEADER_ID=SMSC.SK_XXCCP_HDR_ID_INDCTR_INT
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_N_SALES_ORDER_DAC  NSO
ON ECOHA.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
)  SOCO
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_CHANGE_ORDER  NSOCO
ON SOCO.SO_CHANGE_ORD_KEY= NSOCO.SO_CHANGE_ORDER_KEY

SELECT CSUM(1,1) + MAX_KEY.SO_CHANGE_ORD_KEY,

               QOUT.SK_XXCCP_HDR_ID_INDCTR_INT,
               USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
FROM
(SELECT 
        SCOHA.XXCCP_HEADER_ID AS SK_XXCCP_HDR_ID_INDCTR_INT                  
    FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXCCP_OE_ORD_HDRS_ALL AS SCOHA
GROUP BY  SCOHA.XXCCP_HEADER_ID
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 
                      FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_CHANGE_ORDER AS SSOC
                     WHERE  SSOC.SK_XXCCP_HDR_ID_INDCTR_INT = SCOHA.XXCCP_HEADER_ID)
		       AND SCOHA.XXCCP_HEADER_ID IS NOT NULL) QOUT,     
		          (SEL COALESCE( MAX(SO_CHANGE_ORD_KEY),0) SO_CHANGE_ORD_KEY   FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_CHANGE_ORDER) MAX_KEY

SELECT 
STOHA.XXCCP_HEADER_ID, 
STOHA.ORG_ID, 
STOHA.STATUS, 
STOHA.SUB_STATUS, 
STOHA.SOURCE_DOCUMENT_ID, 
STOHA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF, 
STOHA.ERP_HEADER_ID, 
STOHA.ORDER_NUMBER, 
STOHA.ORDER_SOURCE, 
STOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN, 
STOHA.OPERATION, 
STOHA.GLOBAL_NAME, 
STOHA.CUST_PO_NUMBER, 
STOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID, 
STOHA.ORDER_TOTAL, 
STOHA.TRANSACTIONAL_CURR_CODE, 
STOHA.ORDER_TYPE_ID, 
STOHA.PRICE_LIST_ID, 
STOHA.PAYMENT_TERM_ID,

STOHA.QUOTE_NUMBER,

STOHA.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID, 
STOHA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID, 
STOHA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID, 
STOHA.END_CUSTOMER_ID, 
STOHA.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID, 
STOHA.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_ID, 
STOHA.INSTALL_SITE_USE_ID, 
STOHA.INSTALL_SITE_CONTACT_ID,

STOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID, 
STOHA.SOLD_TO_PHONE_ID, 
STOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_FIRST_NAME, 
STOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_LAST_NAME, 
STOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_PHONE, 
STOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_FAX, 
STOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_EMAIL, 
STOHA.CONTEXT, 
STOHA.DEAL_ID, 
STOHA.SHIPPING_PREFERENCE, 
STOHA.SERVICE_LEVEL_CODE, 
STOHA.ORDERED_DATE, 
STOHA.REQUEST_DATE, 
STOHA.TAXABILITY, 
STOHA.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG, 
STOHA.TAX_EXEMPT_NUMBER, 
STOHA.TAX_EXEMPT_REASON_CODE, 
STOHA.TAX_EXEMPTION_EXCEPTION_FLAG, 
STOHA.DERIVED_TAX_STATUS, 
STOHA.CUSTOMER_PO_DATE, 
STOHA.EARLY_SHIPMENT_FLAG, 
STOHA.INTENDED_USE, 
STOHA.ENDUSER_REQUIRED_FLAG, 
STOHA.SOURCE_DB, 
STOHA.DISTI_SO_NUMBER, 
STOHA.CS_CASE_NUMBER, 
STOHA.CS_REQUEST_ID, 
STOHA.ORDER_CATEGORY_CODE, 
STOHA.TRANSFORMATION_SESSION_ID, 
STOHA.REQUEST_ID, 
STOHA.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, 
STOHA.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE, 
STOHA.VERSION_NUMBER, 
STOHA.VIEW_STATUS_FLAG, 
STOHA.DROP_SHIP_FLAG, 
STOHA.PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, 
STOHA.PAYMENT_AMOUNT, 
STOHA.CREDIT_CARD_CODE, 
STOHA.CREDIT_CARD_HOLDER_NAME, 
STOHA.CREDIT_CARD_NUMBER, 
STOHA.CREDIT_CARD_EXPIRATION_DATE, 
STOHA.CREDIT_CARD_APPROVAL_CODE, 
STOHA.CREDIT_CARD_APPROVAL_DATE, 
STOHA.SOURCE_DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID, 
STOHA.SOLD_FROM_ORG_ID, 
STOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE, 
STOHA.REQUESTED_ORDER_TYPE, 
STOHA.ORDER_TYPE, 
STOHA.PAYMENT_TERM, 
STOHA.PRICE_LIST, 
STOHA.BUSINESS_ENTITY_CODE, 
STOHA.USER_PREF_SOFTWARE_APP_UPDATE, 
STOHA.USER_PREF_ONSITE_FIELD_ENGG, 
STOHA.USER_PREF_ADV_HDW_REPLACEMENT, 
STOHA.USER_PREF_SERVICE_PROGRAM, 
STOHA.ATTACH_MODE, 
STOHA.EDELIVERY_BILL_TO_EMAIL_ID, 
STOHA.TRADEIN_QUOTE_NUMBER, 
STOHA.GOVERNMENT_ORDER, 
STOHA.TAA_DPAS, 
STOHA.DPAS_NUMBER, 
STOHA.SUBMITTER_EMAIL_ADDRESS, 
STOHA.SUBMITTER_LAST_NAME, 
STOHA.TAB_IDENTIFIER, 
STOHA.TAB_CONTACT_EMAIL, 
STOHA.TRIAL_PERIOD_DURATION, 
STOHA.GLOBAL_DEAL_ID, 
STOHA.FRAME_AGREEMENT_CODES, 
STOHA.INTERNAL_USER_SUBMITTED_BY, 
STOHA.NON_AUTO_BOOK_FLAG,

STOHA.TAA_CUST_ACK_FLAG, 
STOHA.TAX_INSTRUCTIONS, 
STOHA.ORDER_NAME, 
STOHA.CUSTOMER_REFERENCE, 
STOHA.CE_ENABLE_COUNTRY_CODE, 
STOHA.CUSTOMER_ACCEPTANCE_FLAG, 
STOHA.CANCEL_REASON_CODE, 
STOHA.TMT_NOTIFIED_STATUS, 
STOHA.REJECT_DUPLICATE_PO_FLAG, 
STOHA.PROMO_CODE, 
STOHA.NET_PRICE_DIFF_IND_FLAG, 
STOHA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_TRANSACTION_ID, 
STOHA.PARTNER_TYPE, 
STOHA.CBN_IDENTIFIER, 
STOHA.COUNTRY_SPECIFIC_USAGE_CODE, 
STOHA.KITREF_ORDER_FLAG, 
STOHA.KITREF_ORDER_NETPRICE, 
STOHA.BEST_GUESS_FLAG, 
STOHA.KITREF_ORDER_TOTAL, 
STOHA.PARTNER_COOKIE_FIELD_NAME, 
STOHA.PARTNER_COOKIE, 
STOHA.SUBMITTED_BY_USERNAME, 
STOHA.INVOICE_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER, 
STOHA.CREATED_BY, 
STOHA.CREATION_DATE, 
STOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
STOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
STOHA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
STOHA.CREATED_BY_USERNAME, 
STOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY_USERNAME, 
STOHA.INTERNAL_USER_UPDATED_BY, 
STOHA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, 
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXCCP_OE_ORD_HDRS_ALL STOHA
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_N_SALES_ORDER_DAC  NSO
WHERE STOHA.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)
